case.name: Single-season batting threshold containment
queries: List batting seasons where a player hit more than 50 home runs and had more than 120 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
List batting seasons where a player hit more than 50 home runs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
List batting seasons where a player had more than 120 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
List batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs and had more than 100 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
case.expected_note: HR>50 and RBI>120 should be contained in HR>50, RBI>120, and usually HR>40/RBI>100.

query_results.question: List batting seasons where a player hit more than 50 home runs and had more than 120 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, b.teamID, b.HR, b.RBI
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
WHERE b.HR > 50 AND b.RBI > 120

query_results.question: List batting seasons where a player hit more than 50 home runs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, t.name, b.HR, b.RBI
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.HR > 50

query_results.question: List batting seasons where a player had more than 120 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, b.teamID, b.HR, b.RBI
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
WHERE b.RBI > 120

query_results.question: List batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs and had more than 100 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, t.name, b.HR, b.RBI
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.HR > 40 AND b.RBI > 100

case.name: Career batting aggregate containment
queries: Find players with more than 500 career home runs and more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career totals.
Find players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
Find players with more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career RBIs.
Find players with more than 300 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
case.expected_note: Career HR>500/RBI>1500 is narrower than HR>500 and RBI>1500. HR>500 is contained in HR>300.

query_results.question: Find players with more than 500 career home runs and more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career totals.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY p.playerID
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 500 AND SUM(b.RBI) > 1500

query_results.question: Find players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, SUM(b.HR) AS career_hr
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY b.playerID
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 500

query_results.question: Find players with more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career RBIs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, SUM(b.RBI) AS career_rbi
FROM people p
JOIN batting b ON p.playerID = b.playerID
GROUP BY p.playerID, p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
HAVING SUM(b.RBI) > 1500

query_results.question: Find players with more than 300 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, SUM(b.HR) AS career_hr
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY b.playerID
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 300

case.name: Pitching strikeout and win threshold containment
queries: List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 250 strikeouts and more than 20 wins. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 250 strikeouts. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 20 wins. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 200 strikeouts and more than 15 wins. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
case.expected_note: SO>250/W>20 should be contained in SO>250, W>20, and SO>200/W>15.

query_results.question: List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 250 strikeouts and more than 20 wins. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, pi.yearID, t.name, pi.W, pi.SO
FROM pitching pi
JOIN people p ON pi.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON pi.yearID = t.yearID AND pi.teamID = t.teamID AND pi.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE pi.SO > 250 AND pi.W > 20

query_results.question: List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 250 strikeouts. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, pi.yearID, t.name, pi.W, pi.SO
FROM pitching pi
JOIN people p ON pi.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON pi.yearID = t.yearID AND pi.teamID = t.teamID AND pi.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE pi.SO > 250

query_results.question: List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 20 wins. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, pi.yearID, t.name, pi.W, pi.SO
FROM pitching pi
JOIN people p ON pi.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON pi.yearID = t.yearID AND pi.teamID = t.teamID AND pi.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE pi.W > 20

query_results.question: List pitching seasons where a pitcher had more than 200 strikeouts and more than 15 wins. Show pitcher, year, team, wins, and strikeouts.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, pi.yearID, t.name, pi.W, pi.SO
FROM pitching pi
JOIN people p ON pi.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON pi.yearID = t.yearID AND pi.teamID = t.teamID AND pi.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE pi.SO > 200 AND pi.W > 15

case.name: Team season wins, year, and rank containment
queries: List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games and finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
List teams after 1990 that finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
List teams after 1990 that won more than 90 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
case.expected_note: After-1990/W>100/rank=1 should be contained in after-1990/W>100, after-1990/rank=1, and after-1990/W>90.

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games and finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.w > 100
  AND teams.rank = 1
  AND teams.yearid > 1990

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990 AND teams.w > 100

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990 AND teams.rank = 1

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that won more than 90 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990 AND teams.w > 90

case.name: Player/team season join containment
queries: Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs and his team won more than 90 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs. Show player, team, and home runs.
Find 2001 batting seasons for players whose teams won more than 90 games. Show player, team, and team wins.
Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 30 home runs and his team won more than 80 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
case.expected_note: HR>40/team wins>90 is narrower than HR>40, team wins>90, and HR>30/team wins>80.

query_results.question: Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs and his team won more than 90 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, t.name, t.W, b.HR
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.yearID = 2001
  AND b.HR > 40
  AND t.W > 90

query_results.question: Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs. Show player, team, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, t.name, b.HR
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.yearID = 2001 AND b.HR > 40

query_results.question: Find 2001 batting seasons for players whose teams won more than 90 games. Show player, team, and team wins.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, t.name, t.W
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.yearID = 2001 AND t.W > 90

query_results.question: Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 30 home runs and his team won more than 80 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, t.name, t.W, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.yearID = 2001
  AND b.HR > 30
  AND t.W > 80

case.name: Award and batting performance containment
queries: List players who won a Most Valuable Player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, team, award, and home runs.
List players who won a Most Valuable Player award. Show player, year, and award.
List players who hit more than 40 home runs in a season. Show player, year, team, and home runs.
List players who won any player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, award, and home runs.
case.expected_note: MVP+HR>40 same-year should be contained in MVP winners, HR>40 seasons, and award+HR>40 seasons if generated on compatible player-year keys.

query_results.question: List players who won a Most Valuable Player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, team, award, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, ap.yearID, b.teamID, ap.awardID, b.HR
FROM awardsplayers ap
JOIN people p ON ap.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN batting b ON ap.playerID = b.playerID AND ap.yearID = b.yearID
WHERE ap.awardID = 'MVP'
  AND b.HR > 40

query_results.question: List players who won a Most Valuable Player award. Show player, year, and award.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, ap.yearID, ap.awardID
FROM AwardsPlayers ap
JOIN People p ON ap.playerID = p.playerID
WHERE ap.awardID = 'MVP'

query_results.question: List players who hit more than 40 home runs in a season. Show player, year, team, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, t.name, b.HR
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.HR > 40

query_results.question: List players who won any player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, award, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, ap.yearID, ap.awardID, b.HR
FROM AwardsPlayers ap
JOIN People p ON ap.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Batting b ON ap.playerID = b.playerID AND ap.yearID = b.yearID
WHERE b.HR > 40

case.name: Hall of Fame and career batting containment
queries: Find Hall of Fame inducted players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and total career home runs.
Find Hall of Fame inducted players. Show player and induction year.
Find players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and total career home runs.
Find Hall of Fame players with more than 300 career home runs. Show player and total career home runs.
case.expected_note: Inducted+HR>500 should be contained in inducted players, HR>500 players, and inducted+HR>300.

query_results.question: Find Hall of Fame inducted players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and total career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
FROM HallOfFame h
JOIN People p ON h.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Batting b ON p.playerID = b.playerID
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY p.playerID, p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 500
warnings: selected SQL: possible join fanout aggregate inflation

query_results.question: Find Hall of Fame inducted players. Show player and induction year.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, h.yearid
FROM HallOfFame h
JOIN People p ON h.playerID = p.playerID
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y' AND h.category = 'Player'

query_results.question: Find players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and total career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, SUM(b.HR) AS total_career_hr
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY p.playerID
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 500

query_results.question: Find Hall of Fame players with more than 300 career home runs. Show player and total career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, SUM(b.HR) AS total_career_hr
FROM HallOfFame h
JOIN People p ON h.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN Batting b ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY h.playerID, p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 300
warnings: selected SQL: possible join fanout aggregate inflation

case.name: College school and career batting containment
queries: List players who attended a school in California and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, state, and career home runs.
List players who attended a school in California. Show player, school, and state.
List players with more than 100 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
List players who attended a school in the United States and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, country, and career home runs.
case.expected_note: California school + HR>100 should be contained in California school players, HR>100 players, and US school + HR>100 players if state/country mapping is correct.

query_results.question: List players who attended a school in California and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, state, and career home runs.
query_results.sql: SELECT "people"."playerid", "people"."namefirst", "people"."namelast", "schools"."name_full", "schools"."state", "batting"."hr", SUM("batting"."hr") AS "career_hr" FROM "people" INNER JOIN "batting" ON "people"."playerid" = "batting"."playerid" INNER JOIN "collegeplaying" ON "people"."playerid" = "collegeplaying"."playerid" INNER JOIN "schools" ON "collegeplaying"."schoolid" = "schools"."schoolid" WHERE "schools"."state" = ? GROUP BY "people"."playerid", "people"."namefirst", "people"."namelast", "schools"."name_full", "schools"."state" HAVING "career_hr" > ?

query_results.question: List players who attended a school in California. Show player, school, and state.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, s.name_full, s.state
FROM collegeplaying cp
JOIN people p ON cp.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN schools s ON cp.schoolID = s.schoolID
WHERE s.state = 'CA'

query_results.question: List players with more than 100 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, SUM(b.HR) AS career_hr
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY b.playerID
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 100

query_results.question: List players who attended a school in the United States and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, country, and career home runs.
query_results.sql: SELECT "people"."playerid", "people"."namefirst", "people"."namelast", "schools"."name_full", "schools"."country", "batting"."hr", SUM("batting"."hr") AS "career_hr" FROM "people" INNER JOIN "batting" ON "people"."playerid" = "batting"."playerid" INNER JOIN "collegeplaying" ON "people"."playerid" = "collegeplaying"."playerid" INNER JOIN "schools" ON "collegeplaying"."schoolid" = "schools"."schoolid" WHERE "schools"."country" = ? GROUP BY "people"."playerid", "people"."namefirst", "people"."namelast", "schools"."name_full", "schools"."country" HAVING "career_hr" > ?

case.name: Salary and batting same-season containment
queries: List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 20000000 and the player hit more than 30 home runs. Show player, year, team, salary, and home runs.
List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 20000000. Show player, year, team, and salary.
List batting seasons after 2000 where the player hit more than 30 home runs. Show player, year, team, and home runs.
List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 10000000 and the player hit more than 20 home runs. Show player, year, team, salary, and home runs.
case.expected_note: Salary>20M/HR>30 after 2000 should be contained in salary>20M, HR>30, and salary>10M/HR>20.

query_results.question: List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 20000000 and the player hit more than 30 home runs. Show player, year, team, salary, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, t.name, s.salary, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN salaries s ON b.playerID = s.playerID AND b.yearID = s.yearID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.yearID > 2000
  AND s.salary > 20000000
  AND b.HR > 30

query_results.question: List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 20000000. Show player, year, team, and salary.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, s.yearID, s.teamID, s.salary
FROM people p
JOIN salaries s ON p.playerID = s.playerID
WHERE s.yearID > 2000 AND s.salary > 20000000

query_results.question: List batting seasons after 2000 where the player hit more than 30 home runs. Show player, year, team, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, t.name, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.HR > 30 AND b.yearID > 2000

query_results.question: List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 10000000 and the player hit more than 20 home runs. Show player, year, team, salary, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, t.name, s.salary, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN salaries s ON b.playerID = s.playerID AND b.yearID = s.yearID AND b.teamID = s.teamID AND b.lgID = s.lgID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID AND b.lgID = t.lgID
WHERE b.yearID > 2000
  AND s.salary > 10000000
  AND b.HR > 20

case.name: Team attendance and winning season containment
queries: List team seasons after 1990 where attendance was above 3000000 and the team won more than 90 games. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
List team seasons after 1990 where attendance was above 3000000. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
List team seasons after 1990 where the team won more than 90 games. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
List team seasons after 1990 where attendance was above 2000000 and the team won more than 80 games. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
case.expected_note: Attendance>3M/W>90 after 1990 should be contained in each single condition and the weaker combined threshold.

query_results.question: List team seasons after 1990 where attendance was above 3000000 and the team won more than 90 games. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.attendance, teams.w, teams.l
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990
  AND teams.attendance > 3000000
  AND teams.w > 90

query_results.question: List team seasons after 1990 where attendance was above 3000000. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.attendance, teams.w, teams.l
FROM teams
WHERE teams.attendance > 3000000 AND teams.yearid > 1990

query_results.question: List team seasons after 1990 where the team won more than 90 games. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
query_results.sql:
SELECT t.yearID, t.teamID, t.attendance, t.W, t.L
FROM teams t
JOIN homegames h ON t.yearID = h.yearkey AND t.teamID = h.teamkey AND t.lgID = h.leaguekey
JOIN seriespost s ON t.yearID = s.yearID AND t.teamID = s.teamIDwinner
WHERE t.yearID > 1990 AND t.W > 90

query_results.question: List team seasons after 1990 where attendance was above 2000000 and the team won more than 80 games. Show year, team, attendance, wins, and losses.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.attendance, teams.w, teams.l
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990
  AND teams.attendance > 2000000
  AND teams.w > 80
